name: @borjie/blackboard-sota
description: Blackboard SOTA (Wave BLACKBOARD-CORE) — classic Erman/Hayes-Roth blackboard pattern modernised for multi-agent LLM systems: regions, knowledge sources, opportunistic control shell, cross-reference detection, token-budgeted summarisation, per-region hash chain. Persona: Mr. Mwikila. See Docs/DESIGN/BLACKBOARD_SOTA_2026.md.
